title: Brocraft-Cobblemon-Additions Community Modpack
description: This is the official Modpack of the BCA Cobblemon additions Community Server as well as the recommended Modpack for using the BCA Datapack.
body:
# Brocraft Cobblemon Additions – Season 1 Server Modpack

Welcome to the official modpack used for Season 1 of the Brocraft Cobblemon Additions Community Server.

This pack contains the exact set of mods used on the server, allowing players to explore the original Season 1 world exactly as it existed during the live server.

Included in this modpack are the actual Season 1 server worlds, preserved so the community can revisit builds, towns, gyms, bases, and adventures from the first season of the BCA SMP.

# What This Modpack Includes
### Cobblemon Gameplay

At the core of the pack is Cobblemon, bringing Pokémon-style gameplay into Minecraft. Train Pokémon, battle trainers, explore the world, and build your team while surviving in a fully integrated Minecraft environment.

# This modpack expands Cobblemon with numerous additions including:

 - New gameplay features and mechanics
 - Expanded battles and UI improvements
 - Raid dens and additional encounters
 - Pokémon utilities and quality-of-life improvements
 - Custom additions from the Brocraft Cobblemon Additions datapack
 - Brocraft Cobblemon Additions

# The pack includes the custom Mod:
### Brocraft Cobblemon Additions (BCA)

BCA replaces standard Minecraft villages with custom Pokémon-inspired settlements, shops, and structures designed specifically for Cobblemon gameplay. These villages create a world that feels closer to a living Pokémon region.

### Expect to find:
 - Trainer villages
 - Pokémon themed buildings
 - Shops and service structures
 - Exploration-based world features
 - Custom loot and mechanics
 - World Generation

### The world is enhanced with:
 - Terralith for massive biome variety and terrain improvements
 - Lithostitched for improved structure generation integration
Together these mods create an expansive world perfect for exploration and Pokémon adventures.

# Exploration Tools

### To help players navigate the massive world, the pack includes:
 - Xaero's Minimap
 - Xaero's World Map
 - Nature's Compass
 - Explorer's Compass
These tools make it easier to locate biomes, structures, and points of interest.

# Performance & Visual Improvements
### The pack includes several performance and visual enhancements such as:
 - Sodium
 - Lithium
 - Distant Horizons
 - Iris (for shader support)
These help the pack run smoothly while allowing players to enjoy improved visuals and larger render distances.

# Quality of Life Improvements

### A wide range of mods are included to improve the general gameplay experience:
 - Storage improvements
 - Better combat mechanics
 - Inventory management tools
 - Waypoints and teleportation
 - Map and navigation tools
 - UI enhancements and animations

### Notable examples include:
 - Waystones
 - Farmer's Delight
 - Sophisticated Backpacks
 - Better Combat
 - Gravestones
 - Season 1 Server Worlds Included

# This modpack contains the archived worlds from the Season 1 BCA Community Server.
### Players can load these worlds in singleplayer or multiplayer to:
 - Explore the original server map
 - Visit community builds
 - Tour player towns and bases
 - Relive the first season of the BCA SMP
These worlds serve as a snapshot of the server's history and a permanent record of what the community created together.

# Join the Community
### The Brocraft Cobblemon Additions project is maintained by Strikebyte and the BCA community.

### The project includes:
 - Patreon-supported development
 - ongoing expansions and updates

Whether you're on your own journey or playing with others, BCA provides the tools, performance, and adventure to make your world feel truly alive.

If you want to join the adventure and take part in the development of the Cobblemon Additions Datapack, be sure to join the [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/strikebyte) today! Trainer tier and above get access to the officail BCA Community Server!
